prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-PRUNSHEARS-HM-75967-96 Product Type: GARDEN_SHEAR_SCISSORS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Gardening Tool Pruning Shears Steel Blades 6.7 Inch Ergonomic Handle Description: Are you an avid gardener, or just getting started with this outdoor hobby? Every gardener, aspiring or experienced needs a durable and reliable pair of pruning shears. The ToolTreaux gardening shears are a must-have tool for pruning branches, removing dead wood, and clipping shrubs, herbs, flowers, and stems.

Our gardening shears feature an ergonomic handle designed to add comfort during use. The rubberized handle can help prevent slippage to protect your hands while gardening, weeding, or pruning.

The pruning shears feature high-quality carbon steel blades that will cut through plant and gardening materials with ease, and the weather-resistant design allows you to safely prune and garden in inclement weather. The pruners also come with a built-in spring that is easy to operate and can help reduce the pressure on your wrist during longer gardening sessions.

PLEASE NOTE - These gardening shears come in two colors (black or green) and the color ships at random based on availability. Search Terms: gardening hand tools mothers gift gardening kit green thumb home plant lover house landscaping projects weeding patio landscaping accessories rake leaf rake Features: - PRUNING SHEARS - ToolTreaux pruning shears are a must-have gardening tool for any beginner or experienced gardener; Use for pruning branches, dead wood, shrubs, herbs, flowers, and stems - ERGONOMIC DESIGN - Gardening shears feature an ergonomic handle for added comfort during use; Rubberized handle helps prevent slippage to protect your hands while gardening, weeding, pruning, and more - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Pruning shears feature high-quality carbon steel blades that will cut through plant and gardening materials with ease; Weather-resistant design allows you to safely prune and garden in inclement weather - EASY TO USE - Garden pruners come with a built-in spring that is easy to operate and can help reduce the pressure on your wrist while cutting branches quickly and efficiently; Ideal for use by any adult (unisex) - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: steel, rubber; Size: 6.7-inch length; Colors: black or green (assorted, ships at random); One size fits most adults === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 6.7 Inch Pruning Shears Steel Blades

anthropic.title_differentiation: Ergonomic Handle, Carbon Steel Blades, Weather-Resistant, Built-in Spring, Rubberized Grip

openai.title_differentiation: Carbon Steel Blades, Ergonomic Rubberized Handle, Built-In Spring, Weather Resistant, Reduced Wrist Pressure
